### Post by jazzyditty on 2008-12-20
Ever since I switched to Ubuntu, I've been having a lot of glitchy youtube videos. Meaning when I view them, boy are they glitchy, ESPECIALLY the HD ones, which is super important to me since all I own is an HD camera, so all of my videos will be uploaded in HD.

What could be the problem and the fix? hehe. Thanks guys.

---
